_comment: Curation overlay for blackjack (v1 of A/B pair with blackjack-trainer).

ab_pair.trigger: AutoBuilder data-interpretation infrastructure changes after this v1 delivery missed the mark
ab_pair.note: First-attempt delivery of the blackjack-trainer prompt. The output was off enough that the user enacted AutoBuilder amendments and re-ran the prompt; that re-run is the blackjack-trainer build. This build was later reclassified-failed under v1.5 when the production-fidelity-exercise loophole was closed.

lifecycle_state_rationale: v1 of A/B pair with blackjack-trainer. User found delivery "off" enough to enact AutoBuilder amendments and re-run. Additionally reclassified RECLASSIFIED FAILED 2026-05-10 under v1.5 amendment (production-fidelity-exercise loophole closure). Two independent reasons this build is not ratifiable; either alone would suffice. Preserved in corpus as the v1 measurement.
